insights.title: Forecast ↑ — Expect App Total Revenue to rebound next period — App Total New Subs +0.9%, led by YMK.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +0.9% runs far above its upstream (App Total New User -7.7%, App Total Install -67.3%; Δ +38.4pp) — the trial cohort is larger than acquisition alone implies. With the 7-day trial lag, expect App Total Revenue to rise next period. App Total Revenue is currently -0.3%, so this points to a rebound, not continued weakness. The lift is concentrated in YMK (+18.6%); YCP is -13.4%.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue's -3.8% isn't from acquisition — check churn / pricing / refunds.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-12 vs 07-05 = -3.8% runs counter to its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 07-05 vs 06-28 = +0.0% — App Total Revenue's move isn't explained by the prior subs cohort; look at churn, refunds, or pricing rather than acquisition.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — All App surging (+0.9% vs upstream -37.5%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: All App +0.9% vs upstream -37.5% (conversion surging); YMK +18.6% vs upstream -4.6% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Data gap — 1 slice(s) missing data — excluded from analysis.
insights.body: 1 slice(s) n/a (missing data): YMK·All·App Total Install.
